creator: m.tsatsenko@gmail.com
text:
www/rubygem-actionpack requires sprockets 2.2.1 while devel/rubygem-sprockets is 2.10.1 which breaks all rails apps (including www/redmine)
We have two options
- Downgrade devel/rubygem-sprockets
- Patch /usr/local/lib/ruby/gems/1.9/specifications/actionpack-3.2.16.gemspec to accept newer version of sprockets

Fix: 

See above, need advice which approach is preferable.
